violations.description: CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted not properly labeled. Observed house made sauces and soups not properly labeled for easy identification.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cups and cases of straws noted being stored on the floor.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine. Bar dish machine did not have sanitizing chemical to dispense during the sanitizing cycle.
